title: Add Salesforce Username Field to Users Table
description: Add a `username` column to the users table to capture the Salesforce username as a distinct, human-readable user identifier for administrative purposes.
acceptance_criteria: Users table includes a username column
Salesforce username is captured and stored during authentication
middleware_changes: Capture Salesforce username during auth flow and persist to users table.
data_model_changes: New `username` column added to users table.
implementation_notes: Username provides human-readable identification vs. Salesforce user IDs.
comment_summary: Waqar confirmed the field was added.
